package.name: hermes_odoo_adapter_launch
package.description: ament_python wrapper that makes the HERMES Odoo Adapter's launch file resolvable by ROS 2 package name. The adapter itself is a Poetry-managed Python application (see ../../../pyproject.toml); this package exists only so `ros2 launch hermes_odoo_adapter_launch hermes_odoo_adapter.launch.py` works alongside the path-based invocation documented in ../../../launch/README.md.
